name: G-5 aggregator: --emit-output-hash appends a sha256: digest over the load_order + rules payload for reproducibility
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
' > tree/google/g.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json --emit-output-hash 2>err.txt; grep -qE 'sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}' err.txt && echo output_hash 1>&2
